content: wild-caught salmon has less PCBs (polychlorinated biphenylols) than farm-raised-caught-cah, which can cause autoimmune issues.
omega-6 in salmon is higher than omega-3, leading to inflammation and foggy feeling.
sockeye-salmon is lower in omega-6 than atlantic-salmon.
Bulgarian-yogurt contains more diverse bacterial profile than greek-yogurturt.
tilapia is fed pig feces and chicken feces, which is not ideal for human consumption.
